description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:10.8.0 Docker image and a cache with key cache_yarn storing .cache_yarn. Define two stages: install and pages. In the install stage add an install job that runs yarn install --cache-folder .cache_yarn, stores node_modules as an artifact that expires in 2 weeks, and runs only on the master and next branches. In the pages stage add a pages job that depends on install, runs yarn build, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and runs only on the master branch.
